session_note: S78 — USER-REPORTED playtest bugs + EXPLICIT go ('run all fixes ... committed and pushed and checked analyzed updated and then /handoff'). Three fixes batched as one priority, SHIPPED baa33f2: (1) game-too-short — SCORE_INCOME_PER_COMPLEXITY_PER_SEC 0.15->0.05 (3x longer games; the S76 P3 income model was shipped un-playtested and crosses WIN=50 during the build-up ramp). (2) random explosions — a FREE (never-picked-up) potato auto-detonated 23s after spawn in the spawn-zone centre, deleting central structures; FIX = a FREE potato DISSIPATES harmlessly at fuse-time (new DISSIPATE_POTATO action mirroring DISSIPATE_BOMB), CARRIED/ARMED still detonate (hot-potato intact). (3) seagull too fast — SEAGULL_SPEED 4.5->3.15 (-30%). Deliberation basis = 3 deep read-only audit subagents (scoring/netcode/render) already run this session = the adversarial analysis; user explicit go. NO protocol bump (all host-side; dissipate just removes the potato from the already-replicated potatoes[] snapshot).

priorities.label: S78 P1 — playtest bug-fix batch (game length + random explosions + seagull speed). (1) constants.ts SCORE_INCOME_PER_COMPLEXITY_PER_SEC 0.15->0.05. (2) FREE-potato harmless dissipate: new DissipatePotatoAction + applyDissipatePotato (mirror applyDissipateBomb), wired into world.ts + KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES Record + main.ts potato poll (state==='FREE' -> DISSIPATE_POTATO else POTATO_DETONATE); potato.spec.ts test renamed. (3) constants.ts SEAGULL_SPEED 4.5->3.15. NO protocol bump.
priorities.check_method: S78 P1 (3-fix playtest batch) SHIPPED baa33f2 (pushed; CI E2E run 27228104021 + Deploy 27228104376 IN-FLIGHT at close -> confirm green next boot per Rule 22; high confidence: local gates green + changes are e2e-low-risk). FIX 1 game-length: SCORE_INCOME_PER_COMPLEXITY_PER_SEC 0.15->0.05 in constants.ts (3x slower accrual; root cause = the S76 P3 income model accrues score DURING the build-up so WIN=50 is hit mid-ramp -> ~2min games + 'ticking too fast'; verified tickScoring runs ONCE per tick at main.ts:570 NOT per-substep, and computeComplexity has no double-count -> pure balance, not a code bug). WIN stays 50 so HUD/SCORE_TIER/hunter-trigger/all tests are untouched (zero ripple). FIX 2 random explosions: root-caused to the FREE-potato auto-detonate -- main.ts potato poll dispatched POTATO_DETONATE for ANY potato at tick>=detonateAtTick, and makePotato sets detonateAtTick=spawnedAtTick+POTATO_FUSE_TICKS (23s from-spawn, Fork E), so a never-picked-up potato exploded in the spawn-zone centre every spawn cycle, deleting central structures. FIX = new DissipatePotatoAction + applyDissipatePotato (bare world.potatoes.delete, mirrors applyDissipateBomb) in potatoLifecycle.ts; wired into world.ts (import + GameAction union + dispatch case) + protocol.ts KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD (exhaustive Record<GameAction['type']> -> tsc REQUIRES the key); main.ts poll now dispatches DISSIPATE_POTATO when state==='FREE' at fuse-time, else POTATO_DETONATE (CARRIED cooked-off-in-hand + ARMED planted still detonate -> hot-potato intact). FIX 3 seagull: SEAGULL_SPEED 4.5->3.15 (-30%; consumed only in spawner.ts vx; tests reference the symbol -> no drift). GATES: tsc -b 0 errors; vitest 1149/1149 pass (60 files; unchanged count -- the e2e potato auto-dissipate test [potato.spec.ts, count===0] covers the new wiring, reducer is a trivial mirror of the already-covered applyDissipateBomb); vite build 543.36KB main (<550 charter, +0.18KB vs S77). No new unit test added (coverage via the existing e2e + the mirrored-reducer rationale). CI e2e NOT broken: potato.spec auto-detonate test asserts only count===0 (dissipate deletes the potato identically) + no page errors; fog.spec aboveFogLayer children===6 untouched; no protocol bump -> no mismatch-literal drift. Token 271969/1M (27.2% GREEN).

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #playtest-fixes #root-cause-before-fix #minimal-risk-lever #user-time-pressure: SHIPPED baa33f2. Three user-reported playtest bugs from the un-playtested S76/S77 batch. DEFINING MOVES: (1) ROOT-CAUSED each before touching code -- 'random explosions' = the FREE-potato auto-detonate (the Fork-E from-spawn fuse fires for ANY potato in the main.ts poll, so a never-picked-up potato blows up in the spawn-zone centre ~every cycle, deleting central structures); 'game over in 2min/ticks too fast' = the S76 complexity-income model accrues DURING the build-up so WIN=50 is crossed mid-ramp (and I VERIFIED tickScoring runs once-per-tick not per-substep + complexity has no double-count -> it's balance, not a bug). (2) chose the MINIMAL-RISK lever for each: rate-only cut 0.15->0.05 keeping WIN=50 (zero HUD/test/trigger ripple) over the audit's bigger win-score+tier rework (deferred as the next lever if 0.05 still feels short); a FREE potato DISSIPATES harmlessly (mirror applyDissipateBomb) rather than re-architecting the fuse -> kills the random blast while keeping hot-potato (CARRIED/ARMED still detonate); seagull one-constant -30%. (3) caught that GameAction's KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD is an EXHAUSTIVE Record<GameAction['type']> so adding the union member REQUIRED the DISSIPATE_POTATO key or tsc fails -- verified every wiring site before building (tsc 0 / vitest 1149 / build 543.36KB first try). PROCESS LESSON: the 3-agent parallel deep-read audit was thorough (found the fouledPrimitives-leak + client sender-auth HIGHs) but cost ~48min/3x100K+ tokens and the user pushed back hard on the time -- for a 'find + fix these bugs' ask under time pressure, lead with direct root-cause reads of the NAMED symptoms (I had both headline bugs nailed from my own reads BEFORE the agents returned) and TIME-BOX or skip the broad fan-out unless the user asks for exhaustiveness; the user's 'run all fixes' is an explicit unlock -> execute, don't over-ceremony. Carried the audit's other findings (2 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM) to next session per the user's 'continue next session'. Gates: tsc0 / vitest1149 / build543.36KB; CI in-flight at close (e2e-low-risk; confirm next boot).
carry_forward: === S78 SHIPPED baa33f2 (USER EXPLICIT GO 'run all fixes') === P1 batch: income 0.15->0.05 (3x longer games), FREE-potato harmless-dissipate (no more random center blasts), seagull 4.5->3.15 (-30%). NO protocol bump. CI E2E 27228104021 + Deploy 27228104376 in-flight at close -> confirm green next boot (Rule 22). === USER WILL PLAYTEST NEXT === then decide if more audits are needed. Tunables if game STILL too short: raise PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE 50->~150 + SCORE_TIER_STEP 15->~50 (audit rec ~5-7min; HUNTER_TRIGGER_SCORE auto-scales). If seagull still feels off: SEAGULL_SPEED (3.15) / SEAGULL_SPAWN_MIN/MAX_SPARKS (15/24 ~every 2min). === AUDIT FINDINGS CARRIED FORWARD (next session) === [HIGH] fouledPrimitives leaks stale ids on sever/bomb/potato destroy paths (only CLEAN_POOP deletes) -> add world.fouledPrimitives.delete(primId) at disruptionManager.ts:165 + potatoLifecycle.ts:187; ALSO an un-cleanable degenerate state when a fouled structure is severed off its splat-anchor (income stuck at 0 forever). [HIGH] client-side sender-auth: clientHandlers.ts trusts ANY peer's GODLY_TRIGGER / NETSNAPSHOT / START_GAME_SIGNAL / ENDGAME (ignores the peerId already plumbed through MessageHandler) -> 1-line host-peerId gate closes backlog #2 client-side; a spoofed high snapshotSeq can permanently WEDGE a victim. [MEDIUM] spawner nextId + 5 RNG streams NOT serialized -> restore() can't resume spawning (latent; restore is test-only today). [MEDIUM] 3+ player client that loses ONLY the host sits in limbo (peerCount>0 so no connection-lost overlay; no host-migration). [MEDIUM] CREATURE_CHARGE not drain-filtered in effectsRenderer.ts:64 despite the lifetime.ts contract -> inflates activeCount; add the skip + a default/assertNever to the draw switch. [MEDIUM] worldTypes.ts:189-197 says fouledPrimitives 'NOT serialized' but save.ts DOES (doc stale, code correct). [LOW] gameState.ts:7-8 stale win-condition docstring; addScore JSDoc stale; protocol DEV override 'as 7' cast rots on next bump; softReset omits fouledPrimitives/hazard Maps (inert, void-suppressed). === PRE-EXISTING BACKLOG === #2 control-message sender-auth (now PARTIALLY mapped above) · #3 EYES fog fuzzy-edge + CVD shape-icons · #4 live-play netcode infra. === DEFERRED PLAN === S69 P2 lobby seat-UX visual refactor.
